name: Cadence Capital Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.7436. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.7437 where 7 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.7436, stop A$0.7128, target A$0.7600. Risk/reward is 0.53:1.
